name: Caveman (token saver)
description: Community skill that makes the agent answer in terse 'caveman' style, cutting ~65–75% of output tokens while keeping technical accuracy. Levels: /caveman lite | full | ultra, plus Caveman Compress for CLAUDE.md.

install.note: Community (~70k★), UNVERIFIED by Loadout — review the repo before installing. Works with Claude Code and 40+ other agents.

name: Karpathy behavioral rules
description: A CLAUDE.md skill encoding four rules from Andrej Karpathy's LLM-coding observations — no silent assumptions, no over-engineering, no orthogonal changes, explicit verification. One of the most-shared behavior skills of 2026.

install.note: Community (~190k★), UNVERIFIED by Loadout — review before installing. Install as a plugin (/plugin marketplace add multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills) or drop its CLAUDE.md into your project.

name: Community plugin marketplace
description: Anthropic's read-only community marketplace mirror — browse community-submitted plugins beyond this catalog. Submit at clau.de/plugin-directory-submission.

install.note: Discovery pointer — anything here is community-submitted; review before installing.
